title: [phase:critique] [family:ui-runtime-review] [provider_hint:subagent] Review the current Happy production resolution. Facts: production /happy/ serves updated HTML with Live Session wired to /cockpit; /cockpit returns 200; unauthenticated GET /api/happy/state,/events,/task-detail return 401 by design...
summary_text: - **Medium**: Auth-stale is non-actionable at point of detection. `sync-copy` tells users to reconnect credentials, but the status strip has no direct CTA; users must infer navigation to Live/Cockpit. Refs: [app.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/src/app.js:122), [app.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/src/app.js:126), [index.html](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/index.html:56), [app.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/src/app.js:950). - **Medium**: Task-detail auth-expired state is also non-actionable. Sheet only shows status text (`detail auth expired`) with no in-context recovery/re-entry control. Refs: [app.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/src/app.js:378), [app.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/src/app.js:813), [index.html](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/index.html:404). - **Medium**: Auth/sync signal discoverability is weak on iPhone scroll. `topbar` is sticky, but auth state lives in separate non-sticky `status-strip`, so stale state disappears quickly while navigating Home content. Refs: [styles.css](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/styles.css:76), [styles.css](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/styles.css:115), [index.html](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/index.html:56). - **Low**: Re-entry path can feel like context loss on mobile: `launchLiveSession()` hard-navigates to `/cockpit` in same tab (`_self`) without passing return context to reopen the same Happy task detail. Ref: [app.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/src/app.js:883).
